title: 4pcs Silicone Egg Poacher Cups with Bonus Oil Brush, Nonstick Egg Poaching Cups for Air Fryer, Baking Oven or Stovetop Egg Cooking, BPA Free.
features: TOP QUALITY MATERIALS: Our egg poaching cup is made of food-grade silicone material and applies durable surface treatment technology. The product is upgraded and thickened, BPA-free and eco-friendly. Temperature tolerance: -40℉to 405℉(0-230℃). Dishwasher safe.

MAKE POACHED EGGS SIMPLY: Using spray oil before poaching to get a better non-stick experience. During cooking, the poacher stands on the pan and in the boiling water, protects the egg from the tumbling action of water while conducting the heat to poach the egg. This is a great eggs cooking tools for your kitchen. SPECIFICATION:

WIDE APPLICATIONS: The poached egg cups cooker can be used as cake, dessert, and jelly mold. They can also be used to melt chocolate, butter, heat pasta source, and steam vegetables. Our egg boiler mold set comes with an extra oil brush and the 4 candy color cups can helps home cooks enjoy cooking fun.

EASY TO CLEAN: It is super easy to remove the egg from the soft silicone. To clean up, simply flip the egg poacher cup over and wash it or just toss it into the dishwasher. This is a simple and practical egg-cooking tool in the kitchen.
PACKAGE CONTENTS: You will receive 4pcs Egg Poacher Cups in different colors with an oil brush.
description: Specifications: Product Name: Egg Poaching Cups Silicone Material: Food-grade silicone, BPA-free Colors: Yellow / Orange / Blue / Green Bonus: Silicone Detachable Oil Brush FEATURES: Food-grade safe silicone Versatile uses Easy to use and remove Easy to clean - dishwasher safe HOW TO USE ON THE STOVETOP: 1. Use a pot and fill it with 1 inch of water and boil it; 2. Grease them with oil and then crack an egg into each cup; 3. Place the poachers inside the pot and cover it with a lid; 4. But 5-7 minutes, give or take, will give you a firm white and a gooey, but still runny, yolk. TIPS: If you prefer your yolks a bit more cooked, you could give it a bit longer.
